summary: Tested all new features: company/bank settings, NEFT export (RMF0001 8-column bank format), continuous GPS location tracking + stops detection, field-staff active list, role-based access, and management-role attendance. All 10 new backend tests pass. Frontend: Settings 'Company / Bank' tab loads & saves with alert; Field Tracking page renders with Leaflet/OpenStreetMap RouteMap (markers, OSM tiles, attribution) when employee has location points; nav restricted correctly. Existing regression suite: 16/17 pass (1 pre-existing duplicate-email failure unrelated to this iteration).

minor.issue: test_create_employee in test_hr_api.py fails on rerun because email already exists (uses fixed email). Pre-existing test data issue, not a backend regression.

action_items: (Optional cleanup) Update /app/backend/tests/test_hr_api.py::test_create_employee to use a randomized email (e.g. uuid suffix) so the regression suite is idempotent.

Geolocation cannot be exercised in headless Playwright; the 2-min interval browser tracker on Attendance page was verified by code inspection (tracking-active-indicator + setInterval calling /attendance/location-update with skipSelfieAndGeofence handled). Backend /api/attendance/location-update is verified end-to-end by pytest.
critical_code_review_comments: Settings PUT /api/settings/company allows hr_admin/management to update — matches request spec. CIN/website/etc are pass-through with no validation; minor — recommended Pydantic field validators for debit_account_no (12 digits) and IFSC (11 chars, 5th=0) on backend, currently only enforced on the UI maxLength.

NEFT export beneficiary name cleaner strips digits as well (uses isalpha()). The bank spec says 'No Special Character is allowed but Space is allowed'. If employee names contain numerals (rare), they'd be removed silently — acceptable given bank requirement.

Stops detection in /api/attendance/location-track uses anchor-based clustering: a single noisy outlier within 50m of anchor extends the cluster but the next anchor restarts grouping — adequate for v1 but may merge two short stops; consider sliding window in future.

/api/payroll/export/neft computes period_label from period using strftime('%b') which is locale-dependent. On non-English locales server output could differ (e.g. 'Apr' -> something else). Recommend explicit month-name dict for safety.

success_rate.backend: 100% (10/10 new feature tests pass; 26/27 across full suite — 1 pre-existing unrelated)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (Company tab, Field Tracking list, RouteMap with Leaflet OSM tiles, role-based nav all working)

seed_data_creation: 6 TEST_Track Field employees (RMF0003-RMF0008) created via tests with punch-in records and location_logs for the day. Company settings persisted with debit_account_no=123456789012, transaction_type=NFT, short_code=RMF0001.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features for iteration-2 are verified. Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_new_features.py (10 tests, all pass when REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is exported). NEFT export verified to produce 8-col xlsx with file name NEFT_RMF0001_<period>.xlsx, txn type 'NFT', debit account from settings (12 digits), IFSC uppercase, beneficiary names cleaned, remarks 'RMF0001 Salary Apr26' (21/30 chars). Field Tracking RouteMap uses Leaflet+OpenStreetMap (no API key needed). Management role attendance flow verified by code inspection only (skipSelfieAndGeofence flag on Attendance.js line 79; tracking-active-indicator data-testid present at line 235).
